schema.description:
A person mapped by an admin, with an optional link to a Famlin user.
Members can filter album assets by person using their `id` as a `personId`
query parameter on the asset listing.

id.description:
The unique identifier for this mapping (provider + externalPersonId).
Use this value as `personId=` when filtering assets.

provider.description: Which media source this person comes from.

label.description: Human-readable name set by the admin at mapping time.

userId.description:
If this person is linked to a Famlin user, their user id.
Otherwise `null`.

schema.title: MediaPerson
